name: GitHub Copilot
description: Monitor GitHub Copilot seat assignments, usage activity, and policy configuration for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to GitHub > Settings > Developer settings > OAuth Apps > New OAuth App
2. Set Redirect URI to: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
3. Request scopes: read:org, manage_billing:copilot
4. Copy Client ID and Secret to Comp AI admin panel
5. After connecting, enter your GitHub organization name

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews GitHub Copilot seat assignments and identifies users with inactive licenses

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies that GitHub Copilot policies are configured to control access by team and environment

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Reviews all GitHub Copilot seat assignments for access review compliance
